title: Product: Roadmap Planning
summary: The team discussed strategies for improving portal user engagement, focusing on onboarding, communication, and training. They decided to leverage a product-led growth model, implement pilot programs to test GPT, and improve internal team training using a tiered approach. Next steps involve creating training materials, conducting pilot programs, and improving data collection to measure impact.

decisions.description: Focus on the "why" behind portal usage to drive dealer adoption.
Leverage the diffusion of innovation theory to incentivize participation.
Focus on improved onboarding and marketing campaigns.
Explore product improvements to increase inherent value.
Implement a pilot program with a small group of dealers to test and improve GPT.
Use a "karate school" approach to training, where initial experts train more people.
Incorporate daily prompts that help managers track their daily tasks to improve usage and retention.

actionItems.task: Create engaging training and outreach materials for the sales and client success teams.

expectedOutcome.description: Improved understanding of the portal's value and demo capabilities among sales and client success teams.

actionItems.task: Conduct pilot programs with a select group of dealers to test and improve GPT.

expectedOutcome.description: Identified areas for improvement in GPT functionality and dealer training.

actionItems.task: Improve data collection and analysis to measure the impact of implemented changes.

expectedOutcome.description: Establish baselines and track user engagement metrics to assess the effectiveness of changes.

tensions: Lack of understanding of dealer needs contributing to low engagement.
Sales and client success teams need improved training on effectively communicating the portal's value.
Team members unable to perform demos and lack of consistent communication about new features.
